name: ai-agent-manager
description: Evidence-based mission control for AI-agent work: preflight, stuck detection, rescue reports, local dashboard and cost gateway.

scripts.smoke: node ./bin/aim.mjs run --label smoke -- npm --prefix examples/broken-ts-app run build
scripts.demo:broken: node ./bin/aim.mjs run --label broken-ts-demo -- npm --prefix examples/broken-ts-app run build
